word: G1931 - ἐπιδύω - epidýō - ep-ee-doo'-o - Go down

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπιδύω

- Transliteration: Epiduo

- Phonetic: ep-ee-doo'-o

- Definition:

1. to go down, set (of the sun)

- Origin: from G1909 and G1416

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1909 and G1416; to set fully (as the sun): - go down.
